steps.title: Identify the cause-and-effect relationship
steps.content: The passage sets up a logical sequence: JWST is optimized for infrared wavelengths, and when distant galaxies' light is infrared, it follows that JWST excels at imaging them. The transition word must signal this consequence.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Consequently directly expresses “as a result,” capturing the logical outcome when JWST's infrared optimization meets infrared light from distant galaxies.

The other three either signal concession (admittedly), correction (actually), or addition (in addition), which don't capture this cause-and-effect relationship.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
